name: menubar
description: A horizontal bar of desktop-style dropdown menus

files.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { MenubarRoot } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <MenubarRoot
    :class="
      cn(
        'flex h-10 items-center gap-1 border-3 border-foreground bg-background p-1 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_hsl(var(--shadow-color))]',
        $props.class
      )
    "
  >
    <slot />
  </MenubarRoot>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { MenubarMenu } from 'reka-ui'

defineProps<{
  value?: string
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <MenubarMenu :value="value">
    <slot />
  </MenubarMenu>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { MenubarTrigger as MenubarTriggerPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <MenubarTriggerPrimitive
    :class="
      cn(
        'flex cursor-default select-none items-center px-3 py-1 text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wide outline-none focus:bg-accent focus:text-accent-foreground data-[state=open]:bg-accent data-[state=open]:text-accent-foreground',
        $props.class
      )
    "
  >
    <slot />
  </MenubarTriggerPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { MenubarPortal, MenubarContent as MenubarContentPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

interface Props {
  class?: string
  align?: 'start' | 'center' | 'end'
  alignOffset?: number
  sideOffset?: number
}

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<Props>(), {
  align: 'start',
  alignOffset: -3,
  sideOffset: 8,
})
</script>

<template>
  <MenubarPortal>
    <MenubarContentPrimitive
      :align="props.align"
      :align-offset="props.alignOffset"
      :side-offset="props.sideOffset"
      :class="
        cn(
          'z-50 min-w-[12rem] overflow-hidden border-3 border-foreground bg-popover p-1 text-popover-foreground shadow-[4px_4px_0px_hsl(var(--shadow-color))] data-[state=open]:animate-in data-[state=closed]:animate-out data-[state=closed]:fade-out-0 data-[state=open]:fade-in-0 data-[state=closed]:zoom-out-95 data-[state=open]:zoom-in-95 data-[side=bottom]:slide-in-from-top-2 data-[side=left]:slide-in-from-right-2 data-[side=right]:slide-in-from-left-2 data-[side=top]:slide-in-from-bottom-2',
          props.class
        )
      "
    >
      <slot />
    </MenubarContentPrimitive>
  </MenubarPortal>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { MenubarItem as MenubarItemPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
  inset?: boolean
  disabled?: boolean
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <MenubarItemPrimitive
    :disabled="disabled"
    :class="
      cn(
        'relative flex cursor-default select-none items-center px-2 py-1.5 text-sm outline-none transition-all duration-150 focus:bg-accent focus:text-accent-foreground focus:translate-x-1 data-[disabled]:pointer-events-none data-[disabled]:opacity-50',
        inset && 'pl-8',
        $props.class
      )
    "
  >
    <slot />
  </MenubarItemPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { MenubarRadioGroup as MenubarRadioGroupPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'

defineProps<{
  modelValue?: string | null
}>()

const emit = defineEmits<{
  'update:modelValue': [value: string | null]
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <MenubarRadioGroupPrimitive :model-value="modelValue" @update:model-value="(val) => emit('update:modelValue', val as string | null)">
    <slot />
  </MenubarRadioGroupPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { MenubarLabel as MenubarLabelPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
  inset?: boolean
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <MenubarLabelPrimitive
    :class="
      cn(
        'px-2 py-1.5 text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wide',
        inset && 'pl-8',
        $props.class
      )
    "
  >
    <slot />
  </MenubarLabelPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { MenubarSeparator as MenubarSeparatorPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <MenubarSeparatorPrimitive :class="cn('-mx-1 my-1 h-px bg-foreground', $props.class)" />
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { MenubarSubTrigger as MenubarSubTriggerPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { ChevronRight } from 'lucide-vue-next'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
  inset?: boolean
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <MenubarSubTriggerPrimitive
    :class="
      cn(
        'flex cursor-default select-none items-center px-2 py-1.5 text-sm outline-none focus:bg-accent data-[state=open]:bg-accent',
        inset && 'pl-8',
        $props.class
      )
    "
  >
    <slot />
    <ChevronRight class="ml-auto h-4 w-4 stroke-[3]" />
  </MenubarSubTriggerPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { MenubarSubContent as MenubarSubContentPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <MenubarSubContentPrimitive
    :class="
      cn(
        'z-50 min-w-[8rem] overflow-hidden border-3 border-foreground bg-popover p-1 text-popover-foreground shadow-[4px_4px_0px_hsl(var(--shadow-color))] data-[state=open]:animate-in data-[state=closed]:animate-out data-[state=closed]:fade-out-0 data-[state=open]:fade-in-0 data-[state=closed]:zoom-out-95 data-[state=open]:zoom-in-95 data-[side=bottom]:slide-in-from-top-2 data-[side=left]:slide-in-from-right-2 data-[side=right]:slide-in-from-left-2 data-[side=top]:slide-in-from-bottom-2',
        $props.class
      )
    "
  >
    <slot />
  </MenubarSubContentPrimitive>
</template>
